justification: The diff attempts a massive framework upgrade (Spring Boot 1.5 -> 3.3, Spring Security 4 -> 5, Hibernate 5 -> 6 implied by jakarta) but sets java.version to 17, not 21, and fails to remove the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter (line 24 in SecurityConfig.java still extends it, despite the comment). It also mixes Spring Security 5.x (5.7.14) with Spring Boot 3.3 (which requires Spring Security 6.x), creating a broken dependency graph. While it uses text blocks (Java 15+) and jakarta.* imports, the core migration is incoherent and incomplete.
